scenario_41.prompt: Hiring a Full Stack Engineer with Java, Spring Boot, React, Next.js, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Leadership, and Communication skills.
scenario_41.reply:
I've optimized an enterprise backend hiring pipeline. Here are the recommended assessments:

| # | Name | Test Type | Keys | Duration | Languages | URL |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Java Frameworks (New) | K | Knowledge & Skills | 17 minutes | English (USA) | <https://www.shl.com/products/product-catalog/view/java-frameworks-new> |
| 2 | Spring (New) | K | Knowledge & Skills | 9 minutes | English (USA) | <https://www.shl.com/products/product-catalog/view/spring-new> |
| 3 | SQL Server Integration Services (SSIS) (New) | K | Knowledge & Skills | 10 minutes | English (USA) | <https://www.shl.com/products/product-catalog/view/sql-server-integration-services-ssis-new> |
| 4 | Amazon Web Services (AWS) Development (New) | K | Knowledge & Skills | 6 minutes | English (USA) | <https://www.shl.com/products/product-catalog/view/amazon-web-services-aws-development-new> |
| 5 | Docker (New) | K | Knowledge & Skills | 10 minutes | English (USA) | <https://www.shl.com/products/product-catalog/view/docker-new> |
| 6 | Core Java (Advanced Level) (New) | K | Knowledge & Skills | 13 minutes | English (USA) | <https://www.shl.com/products/product-catalog/view/core-java-advanced-level-new> |
| 7 | Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r | P | Personality & Behavior | 25 minutes | English International (+38 more) | <https://www.shl.com/products/product-catalog/view/occupational-personality-questionnaire-opq32r> |

Specialized assessments for React/Redux are limited in the current catalog. Showing closest validated frontend engineering competencies. Standardized Success: Pipeline matches enterprise requirements for technical precision.
